_meta.description: This file contains a serialized version of schema entities for drift.

sql.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "business_verification" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_status" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_date" TEXT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "deleted_at" TEXT NULL, "business_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "status" TEXT NOT NULL, "rejection_reason" TEXT NOT NULL, "cac_document" TEXT NOT NULL, "reviewed_by_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "reviewed_at" TEXT NOT NULL);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "user_business" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_status" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_date" TEXT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "deleted_at" TEXT NULL, "user_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "collection_id" TEXT NOT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "type" TEXT NOT NULL, "phone" TEXT NOT NULL, "street_address" TEXT NOT NULL, "city" TEXT NOT NULL, "state" TEXT NOT NULL, "country" TEXT NOT NULL, "verification" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES business_verification (id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "product" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_status" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_date" TEXT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "deleted_at" TEXT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "description" TEXT NOT NULL, "bulk_unit_name" TEXT NOT NULL, "piece_unit_name" TEXT NOT NULL, "units_per_bulk" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "cost_price_per_unit" INTEGER NOT NULL, "selling_price_per_piece" INTEGER NOT NULL, "selling_price_per_bulk" INTEGER NOT NULL, "category" TEXT NOT NULL, "serial_number" TEXT NOT NULL, "image_url" TEXT NOT NULL, "reviews" TEXT NOT NULL, "business_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES user_business (id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "spine_batch" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_status" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_date" TEXT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "deleted_at" TEXT NULL, "expiry_date" TEXT NULL, "batch_number" TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, "cost_price_per_unit" INTEGER NOT NULL, "selling_price_per_piece" INTEGER NOT NULL, "selling_price_per_bulk" INTEGER NOT NULL, "initial_quantity" INTEGER NOT NULL, "remaining_quantity" INTEGER NOT NULL, "product_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES product (id), "business_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES user_business (id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "inventory" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_status" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_date" TEXT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "deleted_at" TEXT NULL, "quantity" INTEGER NOT NULL, "product_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES product (id), "business_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES user_business (id), "batch_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES spine_batch (id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "user" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_status" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_date" TEXT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "deleted_at" TEXT NULL, "image" TEXT NULL, "user_name" TEXT NULL, "first_name" TEXT NOT NULL, "last_name" TEXT NOT NULL, "email" TEXT NOT NULL, "password" TEXT NOT NULL, "role" TEXT NOT NULL, "is_email_verified" INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK ("is_email_verified" IN (0, 1)), "credit_score" INTEGER NOT NULL, "credit_score_status" TEXT NOT NULL, "verification" TEXT NULL, "business_verification" TEXT NULL, "trader" TEXT NULL);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "sales" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_status" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_date" TEXT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "deleted_at" TEXT NULL, "customer_id" TEXT NULL, "total_amount" INTEGER NOT NULL, "amount_paid" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "balance" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "payment_method" TEXT NOT NULL, "status" TEXT NOT NULL, "note" TEXT NULL, "business_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES user_business (id), "created_by" TEXT NULL REFERENCES user (id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "payments" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_status" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_date" TEXT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "deleted_at" TEXT NULL, "sale_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES sales (id), "amount" INTEGER NOT NULL, "reference" TEXT NULL, "payment_method" TEXT NOT NULL);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "product_image" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_status" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_date" TEXT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "deleted_at" TEXT NULL, "product_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES product (id), "local_path" TEXT NULL, "remote_url" TEXT NULL);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "sales_item" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_status" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_date" TEXT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "deleted_at" TEXT NULL, "name" TEXT NOT NULL, "quantity" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, "type" TEXT NOT NULL, "unit_price" INTEGER NOT NULL, "cost_price" INTEGER NOT NULL, "total" INTEGER NOT NULL, "sale_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES sales (id), "product_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES product (id), "batch_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES spine_batch (id), "description" TEXT NULL);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "stock_adjustment" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_status" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_date" TEXT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "deleted_at" TEXT NULL, "business_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES user_business (id), "reason" TEXT NOT NULL, "created_by" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES user (id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "stock_movement" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_status" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_date" TEXT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "deleted_at" TEXT NULL, "product_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES product (id), "business_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES user_business (id), "batch_id" TEXT NULL REFERENCES spine_batch (id), "type" TEXT NOT NULL, "quantity" INTEGER NOT NULL, "reference_id" TEXT NULL, "notes" TEXT NULL, "created_by" TEXT NULL REFERENCES user (id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "stock_transfer" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_status" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_date" TEXT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "deleted_at" TEXT NULL, "from_branch_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES user_business (id), "to_branch_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES user_business (id), "reason" TEXT NOT NULL, "status" TEXT NOT NULL, "created_by" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES user (id));

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "stock_transfer_item" ("id" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_status" TEXT NOT NULL, "sync_date" TEXT NULL, "created_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "updated_at" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), "deleted_at" TEXT NULL, "transfer_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES stock_transfer (id), "product_id" TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES product (id), "quantity" INTEGER NOT NULL);
